message:
Add [integrations.rano] config section for network observer

Add RanoConfig struct with configuration for rano network monitoring:
- Enabled: master toggle for integration
- BinaryPath: optional path to rano binary
- PollIntervalMs: polling frequency (default 1000ms)
- Providers: list of providers to track (anthropic, openai, google)
- PersistHistory: whether to persist historical data
- HistoryDays: retention period for history

Includes DefaultRanoConfig, ValidateRanoConfig, and wiring to
IntegrationsConfig.

Closes bd-1xxhe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
